products.title: Hitachi 2 Ton 3 Star Xpandable+ Inverter Split AC (3400SXL)
products.short_description: Hitachi 2 Ton 3 Star Inverter Split AC with Xpandable+ technology, 4-way swing, ice clean frost wash, and 100% copper condenser for powerful cooling.
products.long_description: The Hitachi 2 Ton 3 Star Xpandable+ Inverter Split AC (3400SXL) is designed for large rooms and delivers powerful and uniform cooling even at high ambient temperatures up to 52°C. It features Xpandable+ inverter technology that adjusts compressor speed based on heat load for optimized energy usage. The 4-way swing ensures even air distribution, while the ice clean frost wash technology helps maintain internal hygiene by removing dust and moisture buildup. Built with a 100% copper condenser and anti-corrosive coating, it ensures durability and long-lasting performance. Additional features include long air throw, silent operation, anti-bacterial filter, and auto convertible cooling modes.
pros: Strong cooling performance for large rooms
cons: High price compared to some competitors
Remote quality complaints in some reviews

positive: Excellent cooling even in extreme heat
Good installation service in many cases

seo.meta_title: Hitachi 2 Ton 3 Star Inverter Split AC 3400SXL Price & Review
seo.meta_description: Buy Hitachi 2 Ton 3 Star Inverter Split AC with Xpandable+ technology, ice clean frost wash, copper condenser and 4-way swing. Best AC for large rooms.
